problem.title: Without the Right System You Lose Margin and Control
problem.subtitle: Every ghost kitchen knows these three problems.

items.title: Platform Dependency
items.text: Lieferando and Uber Eats take 25 to 30 % commission. You lose margin on every order. You're dependent on their algorithm and rules.

items.title: No Own Branding
items.text: On platforms you're one of thousands. Your brand gets lost. Customers remember Lieferando, not you.

items.title: Multi-Brand Chaos
items.text: Managing multiple brands across different systems and tablets is inefficient. Orders come from 5 channels, but nothing runs centrally.

products.title: Everything From One Source
products.subtitle: Five products that work perfectly together. Multi-brand ready.

concept.title: What Is a Ghost Kitchen? The Future of Gastronomy.
concept.subtitle: Also known as Cloud Kitchen or Dark Kitchen. The concept revolutionizing the food industry.

cards.title: The Multi-Brand Concept
cards.text: Multiple restaurants can operate simultaneously from a single ghost kitchen. Pizza, bowls, burgers, and sushi all come from the same kitchen — each under its own brand. The advantage: you cover different niches without renting a new location for each concept.

cards.title: Radical Cost Optimization
cards.text: No service staff for the dining area. Low rents in B-locations. Workflows are purely geared towards speed and efficiency. A ghost kitchen needs 60 to 80 % less space than a traditional restaurant.

cards.title: Data-Driven Menu Adaptation
cards.text: A ghost kitchen sees what's trending in the data, creates digital branding within 48 hours, and goes live. Flops are simply deleted, successes scaled immediately. No renovation, no new menu to print.

cards.title: Decoupled From Atmosphere
cards.text: In the ghost kitchen, only the product and logistics matter. The focus is 100 % on how the food arrives at the customer. Gastronomy like a software startup: fast, scalable, and extremely data-driven.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About Ghost Kitchens
faq.subtitle: The questions ghost kitchen founders ask.

items.q: What is a ghost kitchen and how does it work?
items.a: A ghost kitchen (also cloud kitchen or dark kitchen) is a kitchen without a dining area. You produce food exclusively for delivery and pickup. Multiple brands can be operated from one kitchen. This reduces costs and increases flexibility.

items.q: Do I need a separate app or online shop for each brand?
items.a: No. With Gastro Master you can manage multiple brands through one system. Each brand gets its own [order shop](/produkte/webshop) and optionally its own [app](/produkte/app). All orders come together centrally in one [POS system](/produkte/kassensystem).

items.q: How much do I save without Lieferando?
items.a: At €3,000 monthly revenue you pay Lieferando up to €900 in commission per month. With Gastro Master: €0 commission. You only pay the fixed monthly fee. Find all pricing details in the [pricing overview](/preise).

items.q: Can I start with one brand and expand later?
items.a: Yes, absolute flexibility. You start with one brand and add more online shops, apps, or brands at any time. No new system needed, everything runs through your existing Gastro Master setup.

items.q: What technology do I need for a ghost kitchen?
items.a: Just a tablet or laptop and an internet connection. The [POS system](/produkte/kassensystem) runs cloud-based. Optionally a printer for order receipts. We set everything up for you and train your team.

cta.title: We Help You Get Your Ghost Kitchen
cta.subtitle: Online shop, app, POS system. Everything from one source. 0 % commission. Personal support.
